toolCall.argumentsJson: {"CommandLine":"Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance \"Wael\\Sql2019\" -Database \"Eng\" -Query \"SELECT DEV_ID_Line_No, Account_Code, Value, Credit_Or_Debit, Double_Entry_Vouchers_Description, depet_value, credit_value FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS WHERE Notes_ID = 222112 ORDER BY DEV_ID_Line_No\"","Cwd":"f:\\Source Code\\DynamicErp","WaitMsBeforeAsync":5000,"toolAction":"Querying double entry voucher entries","toolSummary":"Query journal entries for Note ID 222112"}
